channel.title: Prototyping on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Prototyping on Arrans github.io

item.title: andymeneely/squib
item.description: A Ruby DSL for prototyping card games.

item.title: evolus/pencil
item.description: The Pencil Project’s unique mission is to build a free and opensource tool for making diagrams and GUI prototyping that everyone can use.
